---
title: 'Plarn Bags'
date: '2012-06-11T16:30:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2901123383537123830'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/plarn.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Plarn'
  - 'Threads'
  - 'Purses n Bags'
---

<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">Home</a>
<br />
<br />
<h2 style="text-align: center;">

Plarn Purses and Bags</h2>
Plarn? Yes Plarn! Plastic Yarn. This is a water proof crochet material, useful for going out and about. They can be lined and used as a purse. They are great for trips to the beach or water park, or walk at you local farmers market.<br />
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/2012/06/plarn-bags.html" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1192-51b83f18b453.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-size: small; text-align: -webkit-auto;">Plarn Bags</span>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/brown-and-yellow-plarn-bag-9c7843246497.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/brown-and-yellow-plarn-bag-9c7843246497.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!<br />
<br />
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br />
<br />
Flavia Wolfe<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />

<br />

<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe><br />
<br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />
